{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322024011DE9C0C713AF1EF4BF4AD"}"},"total":181},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7479690413802357528","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看的一本有关于乐高幻影忍者的书","text_exts":[{"e":14,"s":8,"text":"乐高幻影忍者","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B9%90%E9%AB%98%E5%B9%BB%E5%BD%B1%E5%BF%8D%E8%80%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774118411EF4BF4AD%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227479690413802357528%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227397241905190276158%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B9%90%E9%AB%98%E5%B9%BB%E5%BD%B1%E5%BF%8D%E8%80%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741504805,"group_id":"7397241905190276158","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4um+VVdKJnUw4b0oVqJwKKZKx9HjsRILzzKT9JaMO7q","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8c5d719672c04707a12f19b0f8098e1e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702444&x-signature=lNeYfRhCsN3Yju6rtIqmaiGz6Mg%3D","user_id":"2370152924982360","user_name":"暗黑x野狼17"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2370152924982360","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7397241905190276158","book_info":{"abstract":"昔者，有幻影宗师首，运四元之力，铸四象神兵。曰裂地之镰，曰奔雷双截，曰玄冰飞刃，曰离火清锋。其威之盛，寰宇莫能并驭，及宗师殁，膝下二子立誓护器，然兄心渐为黑暗所蚀，欲独据神器，遂启阋墙之祸。兄终败绩，堕幽冥之境，弟为安天下，乃秘藏诸器，各遣灵兽并一殊异之徒镇守……
（重点批注：主角不是穿越者！主角不是穿越者！！主角不是穿越者！！！）
凯：这个大师兄吧……什么都好，就是跟赞一样没有幽默感，还是治不好的那种。
赞：大师兄啊，是个很温柔的人呢，就是不知道大师兄他到底有多少属性。
杰：大师兄？大师兄好啊，鬼点子多，而且大师兄什么都会，什么东西问他都能解决。
寇：能和我比力气的人不多，大师兄算一个，而且是那种全方位的碾压。
妮雅：他是第一个鼓励我去做自己想做事情的人，而且大师兄真的对科技好了解哦，真的什么都会呢。
劳埃德：洛哥是我小时候唯一一个对我好的人，说实话，这个绿色忍者更应该洛哥做才对。
吴大师：他是除摩罗外最像绿色忍者的，无论是心性还是实力。
而洛川崎，他对于这些只是淡淡的笑着，感慨自己的这群弟弟妹妹们还是一如既往的可爱呢，就是有点懒罢了……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9467c4e8b3fbb881b63bd6251467520c","author":"霜洛秋花","author_id":"","book_id":"7397241905190276158","book_name":"幻影忍者之万能大师兄","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8e098","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8686人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7397243289734218302","read_count":"8686","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"662628"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"288","tags":"动漫衍生,二次元,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oc42e6a828d7516ee6e22bee1c11552a1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779302411&x-signature=BPQ2OL6z8YzraIpSH3HRYKIJpOw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"100047559405","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"20"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322024011DE9C0C713AF1EF4BF4AD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3873},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1741528430,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7456334369958134552","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"比我想象中的要好很多。本来以为剧情会很僵硬，是各种开挂，但是让我没想到，剧情过渡很自然，角色穿插的也很合理。主角很强又强的合理，总之就是，超级好看！！！
（而且主角和劳埃德尊嘟很好磕[害羞]）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736069120,"group_id":"7397241905190276158","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这个人很懒，什么都没有留下哦～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6cF77dpRVFeLMdycmlr/AkTzBb5+O7naxnMCaKpdbrZ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1e2c109acac243a7bf06876a839be200~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702059&x-signature=FHdYvADwV7VllUQl4g56w12YkGE%3D","user_id":"4497452143481507","user_name":"想起的名都被占了"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4497452143481507","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7397241905190276158","book_info":{"abstract":"昔者，有幻影宗师首，运四元之力，铸四象神兵。曰裂地之镰，曰奔雷双截，曰玄冰飞刃，曰离火清锋。其威之盛，寰宇莫能并驭，及宗师殁，膝下二子立誓护器，然兄心渐为黑暗所蚀，欲独据神器，遂启阋墙之祸。兄终败绩，堕幽冥之境，弟为安天下，乃秘藏诸器，各遣灵兽并一殊异之徒镇守……
